raw_data.name: District Exchange
raw_data.full_address: 22 Union St N, Concord, NC 28025, United States

reviews_data.review_text:
Wonderful selection of stores featuring shoes, music and vinyls, clothes, baby clothes, art, and crafts. Make sure to check out the new coffee shop if you go!

They are still having stores slowly move in, including a wine/beer spot that should be open soon.

Hours are currently a bit random for some of the locations, but im sure it will all change and improve with time. The tables in the middle offer a wonderful area for hanging out with a group!

Yall did it. You made it happen. You saved this historic movie theater and are bringing new awareness to Concord! Love the space for people to hang out, especially the second floor. Looking forward to more depth than just gourmet candy and popcorn! Hopefully something more community oriented and culture building like the sewing studio in the back that will offer classes! Good luck! 🍀
